_comment:
Sentinelle P-08b — Voice Escalation Poller. Source-of-truth for the n8n workflow.
Cron: every 1 min. (1) self-heal: marks escalations 'resolved' when underlying check returned to ok.
(2) gets pending escalations whose escalate_after has passed AND check is still critical.
(3) for each, calls Retell create-phone-call with dynamic_variables.
(4) marks escalation 'voice_sent' with the Retell call_id.
Workflow id (live): esGAok6u0Tz9RwbV — recreate via POST /api/v1/workflows from this JSON if lost.
name: Sentinelle Voice Escalation Poller

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.system_health_escalations e
SET status = 'resolved', resolved_at = now()
FROM public.system_health_checks c
WHERE e.status = 'pending'
  AND e.check_id = c.id
  AND c.last_status <> 'critical'

SELECT e.id          AS escalation_id,
       e.check_id    AS check_id,
       e.alert_id    AS alert_id,
       e.triggered_at,
       extract(epoch FROM (now() - e.triggered_at)) / 60 AS minutes_pending,
       c.name        AS check_name,
       c.criticality,
       c.last_status,
       c.last_detail,
       a.from_status,
       a.to_status,
       a.detail      AS alert_detail
  FROM public.system_health_escalations e
  JOIN public.system_health_checks   c ON c.id = e.check_id
  LEFT JOIN public.system_health_alerts a ON a.id = e.alert_id
 WHERE e.status = 'pending'
   AND e.escalate_after < now()
   AND c.last_status = 'critical'
 ORDER BY e.escalate_after ASC
 LIMIT 5

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ from_number: '+15144184743', to_number: $json.to_number, override_agent_id: 'agent_0a57b37818e2a4f00a725a0759', retell_llm_dynamic_variables: { check_name: $json.check_name, check_id: $json.check_id, criticality: $json.criticality, from_status: $json.from_status, to_status: $json.to_status, detail: $json.detail, minutes_pending: $json.minutes_pending } }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.system_health_escalations
  SET status = 'voice_sent',
      voice_call_id = '{{ $json.call_id || '' }}'
WHERE id = {{ $('Build Retell calls').item.json.escalation_id }}
  AND length('{{ $json.call_id || '' }}') > 0
